title: Board Subscribers
excerpt: How do I unsubscribe from a board/item that i have been subscribed to somehow. Currently I am getting notifications for a board I am not a member of and I checked the automations and I don’t see anything significant in t…

posts.author: abishjones (Abish)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I unsubscribe from a board/item that i have been subscribed to somehow. Currently I am getting notifications for a board I am not a member of and I checked the automations and I don’t see anything significant in there.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Abish,

To unsubscribe yourself or others from a board, click on the “Invite” button on the top right of your board and then click on the “x” next to your name to remove yourself or others. If you are the owner of a board (marked with a blue crown next to your name), you will need to assign a new owner before you can remove yourself as a board member. This information is from the document with the title “Board members > Remove subscribers from a board”.

In terms of unsubscribing yourself from the item, you can do so via the updates section:

Screen Shot 2024-02-28 at 10.47.34 am790×210 10.3 KB

Please let me know if this helps!

posts.author: jsmith91 (Jarod Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca!

We have boards with 100s if not 1000’s of subitems and work in a flexible staffing model. Is there a way to bulk unsubscribe from a board or even find all items/subitems someone is subscribed to?
